scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vba/core && npm run build --workspace @vba/server && npm run build --workspace vba-extension && node scripts/prepare-extension.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:scripts && npm run test --workspace @vba/core && npm run test --workspace @vba/server && npm run test --workspace vba-extension
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @vba/core && npm run lint --workspace @vba/server && npm run lint --workspace vba-extension
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @vba/core && npm run clean --workspace @vba/server && npm run clean --workspace vba-extension && if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package --workspace vba-extension
